personal.preferred_title: Senior Python Developer | Data Engineering & Cloud Automation

summary: Senior Python Developer with 20+ years of software and data engineering experience building scalable ETL pipelines, automation tooling, and cloud-oriented data solutions. Strong hands-on expertise in Python, SQL, data modeling, and analytics platform optimization, with proven success delivering data-driven outcomes in enterprise financial environments. Experienced collaborating with business stakeholders to translate requirements into practical, high-impact technical solutions.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Developed and maintained Python-based ETL and data automation pipelines across 6,000+ telemetry endpoints.
Built robust SQL transformations and optimized data flows for reporting, analytics, and operational decision support.
Partnered with finance/business stakeholders to translate requirements into scalable data solutions and actionable insights.
Implemented data quality controls, monitoring, and process optimizations to improve reliability and platform performance.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Built analysis and automation workflows supporting cloud-based monitoring and performance optimization.
Contributed to cross-functional delivery in fast-paced environments with tight technical timelines.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (APM SME)
bullets: Developed custom scripts and data extraction tools to support enterprise monitoring, analytics, and reporting.
Led technical guidance and solution delivery with strong stakeholder communication and collaboration.

experience.title: Senior Systems & Data Migration Engineer
bullets: Led high-volume data migration and transformation initiatives with emphasis on scalability and reliability.
Designed test and validation routines to ensure data integrity and system stability.

experience.title: Performance Test Engineer
bullets: Performed data-driven diagnostics and performance tuning support for enterprise applications.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: Python ETL and Data Platform Automation
projects.description: Built scalable Python and SQL automation workflows for data ingestion, transformation, and analytics platform reliability.

projects.name: Cloud Data Delivery Optimization
projects.description: Improved data pipeline performance and reliability through monitoring, quality controls, and process standardization.
